title: Install Pendo Analytics Script
description:
Install the Pendo analytics script on the select.php and migrate.php pages to enable user onboarding flows and in-app messaging. The script must include the same unique user ID used by the existing Heap analytics integration.

## Requirements
- Install Pendo script per official setup instructions on select.php and migrate.php
- Pass the same unique user ID that Heap receives for consistent user identification
- Script installation only; Pendo configuration to be completed separately
acceptance_criteria: Pendo script is installed on select.php
Pendo script is installed on migrate.php
Pendo receives the same unique user ID as Heap analytics
Pendo initialization is verifiable via browser console
implementation_notes: Pendo script snippet added to both PHP pages. The unique user ID must match the Heap analytics user ID for consistent cross-tool user identification. Initial install showed verification issues that were resolved by passing the correct user identifier.
comment_summary: Developer added the code snippet but encountered verification issues. After discussion, the same user ID from Heap was added to the Pendo visitor ID field, resolving the setup.
